title: [BUG] Type '{ col: number; row: number; }' is missing the following properties from type 'Anchor': nativeCol, nativeColOff, nativeRow, nativeRowOff, and 3 more.
author: jakehockey10

comments.author: jakehockey10
jakehockey10
comments.body:
I should clarify.  This is not a solution.  This let's my project transpile.  However, I get an error: `exceljs__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__.Anchor is not a constructor`.

This is what my import statement looks like:

```typescript
import { Anchor, Row, Workbook, Worksheet } from 'exceljs';
```

comments.author: mjiskinng
comments.body: Hi @jakehockey10 what is the solution to this problem. Please i am going crazy with this image stretch issue.. Nothing is working. Thanks in advance if your solution can make my life easier.

comments.author: jakehockey10
comments.body:
So far? To not write this code. 

I was really hoping I'd get a response. But I have no solution to this
